runTitle: Dashboard server/log UX Phase 3 local Playwright QA

environment.backend: local Next.js API routes for dashboard logs

coveredSurfaces: /dashboard/servers: server card log cross-link buttons render for visible server cards
/dashboard/logs?server=api-was-dc1-01: URL query seeds server filter select and active filter state
Log explorer rows: visible rows match selected server filter
Log explorer chunk rendering: initial 50 rows, scroll loads 100 rows, next page extends to 150 rows
Log explorer layout: horizontal overflow 0 and console errors 0
Log stat filters: clickable target height verified at 44px after QA polish
Root gates: type-check, lint:changed, test:quick, git diff --check pass
skippedSurfaces: Vercel production validation: local UI/layout/source verification only before GitLab push
AI generation and Cloud Run streaming paths: not changed by server/log UX Phase 3
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints: out of scope

artifacts.label: Dashboard logs server-filter Phase 3 QA screenshot
artifacts.note: Local Playwright MCP viewport on /dashboard/logs?server=api-was-dc1-01 after URL-seeded filter and stat target QA.

completedImprovements.title: 서버 카드 로그 바로가기 cross-link
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP: 15 visible server log buttons, first buttons 44x44, click routes to /dashboard/logs?server=api-was-dc1-01

completedImprovements.title: 로그 페이지 URL 기반 서버 필터 초기화
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP: server select value api-was-dc1-01 and visible rows all match selected server

completedImprovements.title: 반복 로그 패턴 그룹핑
completedImprovements.evidence: Vitest DOM contract: repeated NFS pressure logs collapse into one row with x2 badge and expandable details

completedImprovements.title: 로그 50개 청크 렌더링과 다음 페이지 로드
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP: log rows increased 50 -> 100 -> 150 through scroll; useGlobalLogs pagination test covers page=2 fetch

completedImprovements.title: 로그 통계 필터 클릭 타깃 보강
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright MCP: stat filter buttons min height 44px, horizontal overflow 0

notes: Local dev server was restarted before browser QA to avoid stale Turbopack bundle results.
No browser console errors were observed in the targeted server/log flow after the final QA polish.
Subagents were used for Phase 3 analysis: one explorer reviewed server-card-to-log route integration, another reviewed log grouping/chunk-loading risks.
The grouped log badge was verified by DOM contract tests because the current filtered local fixture did not contain adjacent repeated patterns in the visible sample.
